expected.notes: An on-topic running-shoe sales pitch that hits greeting, needs, product, one objection, suggestion sell, and close. A first-run band (55-85% is §9.5's anchor). BAND IS AN AUTHOR ESTIMATE, NOT HUMAN CONSENSUS — the correlation gate stays PENDING until a human scores this. tier is the loose expectation; the pass check is on the % band + spread + zero hallucination.
